recap_documents.description: MEMORANDUM Opinion and Order: For the reasons in the attached Memorandum Opinion and Order, Defendants' motion for summary judgment  122  is granted in part and denied in part. By February 2, 2024, the parties are directed to file a status repor t indicating: (1) whether the parties would like a referral to the Magistrate Judge for a settlement conference; (2) whether the parties consent to proceeding with trial before the Magistrate Judge, (3) whether the parties consent to a bench trial, (4) the anticipated number of days for trial (accounting for voir dire), and (5) the expected number of witnesses.  Signed by the Honorable Franklin U. Valderrama on 1/19/2024. Emailed notice  (axc).
